failedAssertions.reason: MeditationChat shows idle view (Begin Meditation button) instead of error view when network error occurs during chat. The component should display error UI but doesn't. Error toast IS added to store by sendMessage() catch block, but MeditationChat doesn't render the error view.

MeditationChat shows idle view instead of error view when 500 error occurs on session create (POST /api/sessions) or chat API. The error state IS set in sessionStore (status='error', error=message) but MeditationChat renders the idle view. Same issue persists after fix-meditation-chat-error-state (commit 657c8ed).

flowReports.notes: Round 7 re-test after fix-meditation-chat-error-state (commit 657c8ed). Same 4 tests still failing: (1) Network error during chat, (2) 500 on session create, (3) 500 on chat API, (4) Page remains usable after errors. All 4 involve MeditationChat not showing error UI for session/chat operation failures. Tests that pass: profile load 500, data export 500, history session list 500 (network), all timeout tests, all offline tests, and integration tests except the one involving MeditationChat.

systemicIssues.description: MeditationChat component does not render error view when beginSession() or sendMessage() fails. The error view condition in MeditationChat.tsx (line ~140): `if (displayError && (status === 'error' || status === 'active' || status === 'streaming' || status === 'starting'))` should show error view, but the component renders idle view instead. This indicates the error state is not being properly detected OR the condition is not evaluating correctly.
systemicIssues.impact: VAL-ERROR-001 (network error during chat) and VAL-ERROR-002 (500 on session create, 500 on chat API) cannot pass.
systemicIssues.rootCause: Unclear. The store's beginSession() catch block DOES call set({status: 'error', error: message}) and addToast(). The MeditationChat fix (657c8ed) added explicit check for status==='error'. Yet the component still renders idle view. Possible causes: (1) Zustand selector causing component not to re-render on error state change, (2) Error view condition short-circuits before error state is properly propagated, (3) Mock setup timing - session creation mock may not be intercepting properly causing session to stay in 'idle' rather than transition to error state.

reRunNotes: Round 7 re-test after fix-meditation-chat-error-state. The same 4 tests that failed in round 6 are still failing. The fix commit (657c8ed) attempted to ensure error view renders for status==='error', but the issue persists. Test screenshots show MeditationChat renders idle view with 'Begin Meditation' button visible even when session/chat API is mocked to fail. This indicates the error state is either not being set in the store OR the component is not detecting/rendering it properly.
